name: DrawingUpToDateStatus
summary: The drawing up to date status.

enum_values.name: DrawingIsUpToDate
enum_values.summary: The drawing is up to date.

enum_values.name: PartsWereModified
enum_values.summary: Some parts in the drawing were modified since the last update.

enum_values.name: DrawingIsUpToDateButMayNeedChecking
enum_values.summary: The drawing is up to date but may need checking.

enum_values.name: OriginalPartDeleted
enum_values.summary: The original part from which the drawing was created was deleted since the last update.

enum_values.name: NumberOfPartsInNumberingSeriesIncreased
enum_values.summary: The number of parts in the numbering series has increased since the last update.

enum_values.name: NumberOfPartsInNumberingSeriesDecreased
enum_values.summary: The number of parts in the numbering series has decreased since the last update.

enum_values.name: DrawingWasCloned
enum_values.summary: The drawing was cloned from another drawing.

enum_values.name: DrawingWasSplitted
enum_values.summary: The drawing was splitted (cloned) during numbering.

enum_values.name: MovedViewLabelChanged
enum_values.summary: The moved view symbol has changed.

enum_values.name: DrawingWasClonedFromCloud
enum_values.summary: The drawing was cloned from another drawing in cloud service.
